titleStmt.title: SII 9.139: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 139. (A.R. No. 475 of 1914.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE WEST WALL OF THE VIRABHADRA TEMPLE AT HOLAL, HADAGALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is very much damaged and dated Śaka 996, Ānanda, Ūttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1074 May 31 Tuesday (not verifiable), and refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Bhuvanaikamalladēva (Sōmēśvara II). It records that the 120 Mahājanas of the village Gaṇḍarāditya-Chaturvēdimaṅgala, together with the Telligas, Mummuridaṇḍas and Seṭṭis, made a grant of land for the service of the god Gavaṟēśvaradēva. The five-hundred svāmis made a voluntary contribution of some cesses on commercial articles.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīprituvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśva
raṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraba(ya)kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyā
bharaṇaṁ cāḷukyacakravartti śrīmadbhuvanaikamalla
vara rājyamuttarōttarābhividdhipravardhamānamācaṁdrā
raṁbaraṁ salluttamire svasti samastaguṇasaṁpannaṁ nu
mattennaṁ gaṇa
ya mastapra
sti sahita Īsvara
dēvaṁ śrī mādudu
begaṁ rājita
tava śrīma
ddēvala hanneraḍu
maṁ sukhasaṁ svasti
yamaniyama hōma
samādhi vidyāpā
ragaru ma
davā svasti sama
stabhuva nēkaguṇagaṇā
ḷāṁkritasa nūnavīraba
ḷaṁjadharma guḍḍadhvajavirājamānar
dvātriṁśa cauśaṣṭiyōga
pīṭhamumaṟuvatta gavaṟeya
ruṁ gātrigaruṁ seṭṭiya bhalluṁkidaṇḍahastaruṁ
vēḷāṁbara hāsapūrṇnaruṁ
kāryya ye maddaḷeyā
ge diggajaṁgaḷē nāge samudra
mē nīrggārigeyāge varuṇanē karagabaḷanāge tārābaḷamē
baḷamāge caṁdrādityarkkaḷē nanniyeṁba pala
geyaṁ baredu Abhimānameṁba
surigeyiṁ kalikrōdhameṁba satruvaniṟidu kādi gelda bhaga
vatiya makkaḷu śrīmatu Eṁṭunāḍa padinaṟuvaruṁ Āyyāvoḷepura
varēsvararappa Aynūrvvasvāmigaḷ svasti sakavaruṣa 996 neya
Ānandasaṁvatsara Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁtiyaṁdu śrīmatu ga
ṇḍarādityacaturvvēdimaṁgaḷada nūṟirppadiṁbaruṁ Alli
ya taḷa samasta telligarayvattokkaluṁ mummuridaṇḍamuṁ
seṭṭiputrarkāmayya saṁciseṭṭiyuṁ jakkiseṭṭiyuṁ dāsiseṭṭiyuṁ māciseṭṭiyu
miḻdu gavaṟēśvaradēvarge biṭṭa dattiyenteṁdeḍe haḷḷadiṁdaṁ teṁkalu taga
remānya I dharmama(ṁ)nnāvanōrvva pratipāḷisidanappaḍe gaṁgeya taḍiyalu sāsira kavileyumaṁ dāna
geyda phalamakku I dhaṁmanāḷidavaṁ paṁcamahāpātakanakku . Aynūrvvarumiḻdu pasuṁbeya
sēseyalu pāgamumaṁ Aṁgaḍiyalu soṭigebhattama biṭṭar .
vaccayyaṁmodalāgi Aṟvattokkaluṁ gāṇadalu soṁṭige E
ṇneyaṁ biṭṭar vaḍḍalāvuḷada suṁkaverggaḍe dāsayyanu po
dāna kha 50 sāsira Arkava davasada
vaṁ biṭṭar . Ī dharmamanārōrvvaru pratipāḷi
si yalu sāsi yaṁ dānaṁgeyda
phala . Ārānuṁ biṭṭaru biḍatirada suvātana
biṭṭanāraṁ dharmamidaṁ keyyoḍe rakṣipudu pakṣapātadoḷellaṁ
svadataṁ paradataṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . saṣṭirvvarṣasaha
srāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi[*ḥ] . rudrābharaṇa
jīyaru biṭṭa datti . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī .
Lines 35, 37 and 38 are written in small characters.
Digital edition of SII 9.139 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
